mintonetteCup.title: Mintonette Cup
mintonetteCup.descri: Montpellier hosts the Mintonette Cup, the world volleyball tournament that brings together the best players!

prestataire.devenir:
Want to be part of the adventure?


Whether you offer entertainment, a shop, or catering services,
become an official Mintonette Cup provider!

Join the team and bring your expertise to the event:
prestataire.estDeja:
Welcome to our providers!

Thank you for contributing to the Mintonette Cup with your expertise.
You can manage your services and update your information below:
prestataire.enAttente:
Your service provider request has been received.
It will be reviewed by an administrator and you will be notified as soon as it is approved.
prestataire.nonConnecte:
Want to join the adventure?


Become an official Mintonette Cup vendor and offer your services to all participants.
Log in or create an account to submit your application!

competition.descri:
Dive into the competition!

Dive into the heart of the competition and explore the countries competing in the Mintonette Cup.
Lineups, photos, and key information: it’s all here!

Whether you're a player, a supporter, or just curious, discover all the tournament countries:

burgerStand.title: Burger Stand
burgerStand.description:
Good news! The burger stand will be present at the Mintonette Cup.
You will find a wide selection to satisfy all tastes: delicious classic burgers,
gourmet creations, and vegetarian options so everyone can enjoy.

Whether you are a meat lover or prefer lighter alternatives, everyone will be warmly welcomed. It's the perfect opportunity to share a friendly moment over a good meal while enjoying the event!

modal.connexion:
Login successful! 
 Happy to see you back on the court.
modal.inscription:
Registration complete! 
 Welcome to the volleyball adventure.

PresentationMintonette.title: WHO ARE WE?
PresentationMintonette.texte1: The great world Volleyball tournament Mintonette Cup is coming to Montpellier! Our third edition promises to be amazing.
PresentationMintonette.texte2: Are you a sports enthusiast, do you love following major sporting events that bring together passionate fans and a great atmosphere? The Mintonette Cup awaits you!
PresentationMintonette.texte3: On the agenda: thrilling matches, an amazing audience and a bustling atmosphere.
PresentationMintonette.texte4: We look forward to seeing you in the stands!

information.descriEdition: The Mintonette Cup, now hosted in Montpellier, has seen remarkable growth and has become one of the major events for amateur volleyball in the South of France. The previous edition gathered nearly 15,000 spectators over three days, thanks to the appeal of Montpellier’s facilities and the city’s strong volleyball culture, notably supported by Montpellier Hérault Sport Club Volleyball.
information.descriPratiquants: This is the number of people playing volleyball, whether for leisure, school programs, or at a high level. This makes volleyball one of the most popular team sports in the world, just behind football.
information.descriPays: This is the number of countries where volleyball is represented today through various clubs, competitions, and national federations. The International Volleyball Federation (FIVB) has over 220 member federations, showing the sport's global reach and presence.
information.descriAudience: This was the peak viewership recorded for a volleyball match in 2024, demonstrating the growing public interest in the sport. International competitions attract millions of viewers and increase volleyball’s visibility.
information.descriReseauxSociaux: This is the number of social media interactions related to the previous edition of the Mintonette Cup. The organizers hope to exceed 300,000 online views this year, further boosting its visibility. Social media were not left behind !

footer.remerciement: WITH THE COLLABORATION AND A BIG THANK YOU TO :

prestataire.title: Competition Service Providers Management
prestataire.descri:
Welcome to the administration area dedicated to service providers involved in our volleyball events. 
Here, you can view all the services offered: catering, entertainment, shops, and services for teams and spectators. Pending requests must be approved before the provider can operate on the field or in event areas. 
This management ensures an optimal and safe experience for all participants.
prestataire.nb_prestaVide: All service providers are ready for the field and event areas: the competition can proceed smoothly!
prestataire.messageSuppr: is no longer part of the competition’s service providers.
prestataire.messageRefus: The provider has been declined and marked as inactive in the competition.

modal.confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the service provider

service.title: Discover this provider
service.descri: Find here all the information about {nom_prestataire} : the services offered, pricing, number of participants accommodated, as well as contact details. This provider takes part in the event and puts their expertise at your disposal.
service.nb_servicesVide: No services are available for this provider.
service.messageActiver: The service {nomService} has been activated.
service.messageDesactiver: The service {nomService} has been deactivated.
service.messageSuppr: The service {nomService} has been deleted.

user.title: User Management
user.descri: Welcome to the user administration area. Here, you can view, manage, and delete registered accounts. This page ensures platform security and proper functionality by allowing only valid users to access its features. Deleting a user is permanent, so please double-check the information before confirming.

boiteRecep.texte: Your inbox centralizes all messages received on the platform. It allows you to view requests sent by competition service providers, read new messages and easily track the progress of exchanges. This space makes it easy to manage conversations, helps you stay informed of ongoing requests and ensures a clear and organized follow-up of exchanges with service providers.
